content:
# Noise Survey

**Summary**: A method used to detect fluid movement or gas presence by measuring acoustic noise levels in the wellbore.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014]] used noise surveys to identify flow and gas zones based on frequency analysis.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The maximum noticed frequency was 18 KHZ; frequencies $\geq$ 9 KHZ supported leak detection when combined with other anomalies. ([[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014, p. 65]])
